content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 5, 1), (3, 6, 1), (4, 7, 2), (1, 3, 6), (1, 5, 12), (0, 4, 20), (1, 7, 20), (5, 9, 22), (0, 8, 26), (7, 9, 27), (6, 8, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 26.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (3, 5, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 6, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 7, 2) has node 4 and time 2. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 3, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (1, 5, 12) has node 1 and time 12. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 4, 20) has node 0 and time 20. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 7, 20) has node 1 and time 20. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 9, 22) has node 5 and time 22. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 8, 26) has node 0 and time 26. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 27) has node 7 and time 27. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 8, 29) has node 6 and time 29. -> Add node 8.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 8 at time 26:

* Node 5
* Node 9

The final answer is: [5, 9]
